title: Glowing Items
description: Adds a colorful outline to various items
body:
![Glowing Items Background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86b13bf75bde5a03bbc219f2f3b819e562a0de95_0.webp)**Glowing Items** adds a colored outline to various items which gives enchanted items a cool enchantment effect and other items, which look like they should be exuding some sort of aura, a colorful outline to help bring that visual to life _____________________________________________________________________________________________________ # Here's a list of the items included: - Swords (enchanted) - Pickaxes (enchanted) - Axes (enchanted) - Shovels (enchanted) - Hoes (enchanted) - Shield (enchanted) - Trident (enchanted) - Bow (enchanted) - Crossbow (enchanted) - Mace (enchanted) - Enchanted Book - Enchanted Golden Apple - Experience Bottle - Nether Star - Dragon's Breath - Totem Of Undying - Trial Key - Ominous Trial Key - Lodestone Compass - Recovery Compass - Glow Ink Sac - Glowberries - Glowstone Dust - Fishing Rod (enchanted) - Carrot On a Stick (enchanted) - Warped Fungus On a Stick (enchanted) - Brush (enchanted) - Shears (enchanted) _____________________________________________________________________________________________________ **Credits:** - Edited shader file from [Weskerson's Torches](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/weskersons-torches) _________________________________________________________________________________________________ ## Check out my other resoucepack:
**Coppered Equipment** [![Coppered Equipment Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/995a51841b7a6a124af69d57f98e728e2e7aa314_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/coppered-equipment)
